title: Hooklift Operator
description:
Role Summary

The Internal Driver operates the company Hooklift truck to manage the logistics of Open Top Containers (OTCs) within the Material Recovery Facility site. You are the primary support for moving full and empty containers to ensure operations continue without bottlenecks.

Key Responsibilities

  • Container Management: Operate the hookliftmechanism to lift, transport, and place Open Top Containers (OTCs) designated for metals, waste, or recyclables.
  • Departmental Support: Respond immediately to requests from various departments (e.g., Metal Line, General Waste) to adjust,reposition, or swap out OTCs as needed.
  • Traffic Coordination: Maneuverer large trucks safely within the yard, coordinating with ground staff to ensure safe placementof bins.
  • Vehicle Maintenance: Conduct daily pre-tripinspections of the truck and hydraulic hook system; ensure the vehicle is clean and in safe working condition.
  • Load Safety: Ensure all containers are securelyhooked and locked before movement to prevent spills or accidents.

Requirements

  • Licensing: Valid Heavy Vehicle Driver’s License (Class 4/5 or equivalent).
  • Experience: Proven experience operating Hooklifttrucks or similar heavy rigid vehicles.
  • Flexibility: Willingness to assist different teams on an ad-hoc basis when containers need urgent moving.
  • Safety Record: Clean driving record with a strong focus on site safety protocols

Working Conditions      

  • Work is primarily performed inside the truck cabbut involves frequent mounting/dismounting to check loads.
  • Environment includes heavy traffic, noise, andexposure to waste materials.

postedCompany.description:
Cora Environment is a purpose-driven sustainable waste management company that rethinks waste. Envisioning a zero-waste future, our holistic approach empowers businesses to reduce their environmental footprint, through end-to-end solutions from waste profiling and infrastructure to resource recovery and energy-from-waste. We create value by driving industry partnerships to transform the waste landscape and shape the future for generations to come. Inspired by the words ‘collaboration’ and ‘heart’, the name “Cora” reflects our commitment to putting people, purpose and planet at the heart of everything we do.

With over 45 years of experience, Cora Environment is a leading waste management company serving the City-Punggol and Clementi-Bukit Merah sectors. We manage public, industrial, and commercial waste, and operate a material recovery facility and an energy-from-waste plant.
postedCompany.name: CORA ENVIRONMENT GROUP PTE. LTD.
